statement: In every magma, Equation 2198 (`x = ((y * z) * z) * (x * w)`) implies Equation 882 (`x = y * ((x * y) * (y * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0548
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) z) (op x w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x y) (op y x)))
